torch_pattern: x = input_tensor_a.reshape(*input_tensor_a.shape[:-1], -1, 2); x_real, x_imag = x.chunk(2, dim=-1); out = torch.cat([-x_imag, x_real], dim=-1).flatten(-2)
applicability_notes: fusion_notes: Replaces a 5-op torch chain (reshape, chunk, neg, cat, flatten) with a single ttnn op. Call sites show it is the interleaved-format counterpart of rotate_half (slice-half + neg + concat); one call site notes interleaved format yields lower PCC than rotate_half, so verify accuracy when substituting.
